sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince's optimal f method: multiply HPRs across all scenarios to derive optimal position sizing. Formula: HPR_combined = HPR_scenario1 × HPR_scenario2 × ... × HPR_scenarioN. The resulting combined HPR determines capital fraction to risk per trade.

source_rule_text: Calculate position sizing by converting multiple scenarios into their respective HPRs (Holding Period Returns) for a given f value, then multiply all HPRs together to determine optimal position size across cumulative probability outcomes.
